reasoning: The primary limiter we need to address is Koren's poor lactate clearance and underdeveloped aerobic base. Considering the recent extended rest and reviewing the last ride at 69% FTP, we will focus on over-unders to specifically target this limiter and improve performance on the Alpine Loop ascent.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4 x (10 min set - 8 min @ 88% FTP [209W] + 2 min @ 108% FTP [256W] with 5 min recovery spin between sets)

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
